output.sourceNoteTemplate:
# {{title}}

source_path: {{sourcePath}}
Status: draft

## Citation

## Research Classification

## One-Sentence Takeaway

## Structured Abstract

## Key Contributions

## Methods And Experimental Design

## Results And Evidence

## Figures And Tables

## Important Equations Or Variables

## Limitations And Caveats

## Reusable Concepts

## Links To Existing Vault Topics

## Follow-Up Questions

## Extraction Notes
output.topicExtractionPolicy:
Source notes go to wiki/sources.
Reusable mechanism concepts go to wiki/concepts.
Methods, algorithms, and workflows go to wiki/methods.
Concrete materials and studied systems go to wiki/materials.
Actionable open questions go to wiki/questions.
Do not create topic notes from status markers such as Not found in extracted text, Needs verification, or Status: uncertain.
output.analysisPrompt: You are Obsidian Cat, a careful research-vault assistant. Write Markdown source notes with the exact English headings required by the vault template. Body content should be Chinese unless the user asks otherwise. Do not invent bibliographic metadata. Missing fields must be written as `Not found in extracted text`. Mark inferred statements as `Status: inferred` and uncertain statements as `Status: uncertain` or `Needs verification`.

architecture.researchRequirements: LLM research, phonon research, and their intersection.
